Wizard the Evoker[14CSt:11 Dx:11 Co:13 In:18 Wi:10 Ch:12 Neutral
Dlvl:1 $:0 HP:12(12) Pw:8(8) AC:9 Xp:1

As you touch the Eye of the Aethiopica, its comforting power infuses you
with new energy.  You feel as if you can detect others' thoughts flowing
through it.  Although you yearn to wear the Eye of the Aethiopica and
attack the Wizard of Yendor, you know you must return it to its rightful
owner, Neferet the Green.


















--More--

p - a spherical amulet named the Eye of the Aethiopica.
